feat.name: Nimble Strike
feat.text: You’re cunning enough to find an opening in an opponent’s attack. When you use your Nimble Dodge reaction, you can make a melee Strike against the triggering creature. This Strike doesn’t count toward your multiple attack penalty, and your multiple attack penalty doesn’t apply to this Strike. If you use the Nimble Roll feat, you can make this Strike at any point during your roll.

traits.name: Rogue
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the rogue class.
